headline: Uber Makes Indicative €33 Per Share Offer to Acquire Delivery Hero
summary: Uber made an indicative €33-per-share takeover bid for Delivery Hero, its largest shareholder, as the German firm reviews its strategy.

headline: Delivery Hero Says Uber Proposed €33 a Share Takeover Bid

headline: Uber and DoorDash hold talks with Delivery Hero over potential buyout
summary: Investing.com -- Ride-hailing companies Uber (NYSE: UBER) and DoorDash (NASDAQ: DASH) have held talks with investors of food delivery group Delivery Hero about a possible buyout, according to a Financial Times report on Saturday. This follows Friday’s Bloomberg report that Uber was considering a full takeover of Delivery Hero.

headline: Uber Weighs Delivery Hero Deal And Liability Shift For Investors
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) is reported to be exploring a full takeover of European food delivery group Delivery Hero. The potential deal would expand Uber’s international delivery footprint as competition with DoorDash intensifies. In parallel, a bill advanced by the US House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee aims to sharply limit Uber’s liability for accidents and driver misconduct. For you as an investor, these developments sit at the core of what Uber does. The company runs...
